name: Feed suggestion

## Feed URL

```
https://
```

## Feed name / publication

What is this feed? Who publishes it?

## Category

Where should it go in the digest?

- [ ] Security News (threat intelligence, breach reports, industry news)
- [ ] CVE / Vulnerability (vuln disclosures, patch advisories)
- [ ] Homelab / Tooling (self-hosting, open source tools, infrastructure)
- [ ] CySA+ Relevant (blue team, SOC, compliance, incident response)
- [ ] CCNA / Networking (networking concepts, Cisco, routing/switching)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Why it's relevant

What makes this feed worth adding to a security/homelab-focused digest?

Example topics it covers:

## Signal-to-noise

How often does it publish? Is the content consistently high-quality or does it mix useful posts with marketing/fluff?

- Publish frequency: (e.g. daily, 2-3x/week, irregular)
- Signal quality: (high / medium / low — and why)

## Verified working

- [ ] I confirmed the feed URL resolves and returns valid RSS/Atom XML
- [ ] I checked that it's not paywalled or auth-required

## Notes

Anything else — related feeds, overlap with existing sources, etc.
